item.title: ‘Sent the kittens scarpering’: the best cat toys in the UK, tested by cats
item.summary: From catnip to interactive, scented and all-natural teasers, here are the toys our reviewer’s panel of feline testers fell head over paws for • The best gifts for cats and dogs Watch a cat doing as they please in a garden, and you’ll witness a procession of behaviours passed down from their wild ancestors. They may crouch with ears pricked up at the sight or sound of birds in flight; rub against objects to leave their scent; chase buzzing, drowsing insects; or sniff a favourite plant with gusto. Regrettably, some will hunt and catch prey. The best cat toys help any cat – indoor or outdoor – live out these behaviours safely, humanely, and often with their owner’s involvement. Having a few within paw’s reach is valuable to a pet cat’s fitness, mood and fundamental felinity. Best cat toy overall: Nature’s Goodies colourful long raffia tail teaser sticks Best budget cat toy: Pets at Home scrunchie ball Continue reading...
